title: Total Employee Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator to compute the fully loaded cost of an employee, including direct compensation, indirect benefits, overhead, and productivity loss factors, aligned with ISO 30400, Lean, and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Base Annual Salary
inputs.businessContext: Annual gross salary before any deductions or benefits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual gross salary before any deductions or benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir kesinti veya yan hak öncesi yıllık brüt maaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliches Bruttogehalt vor Abzügen oder Zusatzleistungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire brut annuel avant déductions ou avantages.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario bruto anual antes de deducciones o beneficios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الراتب السنوي الإجمالي قبل أي خصومات أو مزايا.

inputs.label: Target Bonus (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Typical annual bonus as a percentage of base salary.

label_i18n.fr: Bonus cible (% du salaire de base)

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical annual bonus as a percentage of base salary.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tipik yıllık bonus, maaşın yüzdesi olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Typischer jährlicher Bonus als Prozentsatz des Grundgehalts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bonus annuel typique en pourcentage du salaire de base.
businessContext_i18n.es: Bono anual típico como porcentaje del salario base.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المكافأة السنوية النموذجية كنسبة مئوية من الراتب الأساسي.

inputs.label: Benefits Cost (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Includes health insurance, retirement contributions, paid leave, etc. Typical range 25-40%.

label_i18n.fr: Coût des avantages (% du salaire de base)
label_i18n.es: Costo de beneficios (% del salario base)

businessContext_i18n.en: Includes health insurance, retirement contributions, paid leave, etc. Typical range 25-40%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sağlık sigortası, emeklilik katkıları, ücretli izin vb. içerir. Tipik aralık %25-40.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umfasst Krankenversicherung, Rentenbeiträge, bezahlten Urlaub usw. Typischer Bereich 25-40%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Inclut assurance santé, cotisations retraite, congés payés, etc. Plage typique 25-40%.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incluye seguro de salud, aportes de jubilación, licencia pagada, etc. Rango típico 25-40%.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تشمل التأمين الصحي، مساهمات التقاعد، الإجازات المدفوعة، إلخ. النطاق النموذجي 25-40%.

inputs.label: Payroll Tax (% of base salary)
inputs.businessContext: Employer portion of Social Security and Medicare (FICA) in the US.

label_i18n.fr: Taxe sur les salaires (% du salaire de base)
label_i18n.es: Impuesto sobre nómina (% del salario base)

businessContext_i18n.en: Employer portion of Social Security and Medicare (FICA) in the US.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ABD'de Sosyal Güvenlik ve Medicare (FICA) işveren payı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Arbeitgeberanteil zur Sozialversicherung und Medicare (FICA) in den USA.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Part employeur de la Sécurité sociale et Medicare (FICA) aux États-Unis.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parte del empleador del Seguro Social y Medicare (FICA) en EE. UU.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حصة صاحب العمل من الضمان الاجتماعي والرعاية الطبية (FICA) في الولايات المتحدة.

inputs.label: Overhead Allocation (% of direct cost)
inputs.businessContext: Facilities, equipment, IT, admin support allocated per employee.

label_i18n.fr: Allocation de frais généraux (% du coût direct)
label_i18n.es: Asignación de gastos generales (% del costo directo)
label_i18n.ar: تخصيص التكاليف العامة (% من التكلفة المباشرة)

businessContext_i18n.en: Facilities, equipment, IT, admin support allocated per employee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan başına dağıtılan tesis, ekipman, BT, idari destek.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einrichtungen, Ausrüstung, IT, Verwaltungsunterstützung pro Mitarbeiter zugeordnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Installations, équipement, informatique, support administratif alloués par employé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Instalaciones, equipos, TI, soporte administrativo asignados por empleado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المرافق، المعدات، تكنولوجيا المعلومات، الدعم الإداري المخصص لكل موظف.

inputs.label: Annual Training Cost per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of training programs, certifications, and development.

label_i18n.fr: Coût annuel de formation par employé
label_i18n.es: Costo anual de capacitación por empleado

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct cost of training programs, certifications, and development.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğitim programları, sertifikalar ve gelişimin doğrudan maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Kosten für Schulungsprogramme, Zertifizierungen und Weiterbildung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût direct des programmes de formation, certifications et développement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo directo de programas de capacitación, certificaciones y desarrollo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة المباشرة لبرامج التدريب والشهادات والتطوير.

inputs.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Lean metric: actual productive time vs. available time. 1 = full productivity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lean metric: actual productive time vs. available time. 1 = full productivity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yalın metrik: fiili üretken zamanın mevcut zamana oranı. 1 = tam üretkenlik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lean-Kennzahl: tatsächliche Produktivzeit vs. verfügbare Zeit. 1 = volle Produktivität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Métrique Lean : temps productif réel vs temps disponible. 1 = pleine productivité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Métrica Lean: tiempo productivo real vs. tiempo disponible. 1 = productividad total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس اللين: الوقت الإنتاجي الفعلي مقابل الوقت المتاح. 1 = إنتاجية كاملة.

inputs.label: Annual Turnover Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of employees leaving per year. Drives replacement and ramp-up costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of employees leaving per year. Drives replacement and ramp-up costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda ayrılan çalışan yüzdesi. Değiştirme ve alıştırma maliyetlerini doğurur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Mitarbeiter, die pro Jahr ausscheiden. Treibt Ersatz- und Einarbeitungskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'employés quittant l'entreprise par an. Entraîne des coûts de remplacement et de montée en compétence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de empleados que se van por año. Genera costos de reemplazo y puesta a punto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الموظفين المغادرين سنويًا. يؤدي إلى تكاليف الاستبدال والتأهيل.

rules.message: Sum of bonus, benefits, and payroll tax percentages exceeds 100% of base salary. Please adjust.
High turnover rate with low replacement cost may underestimate true cost. Consider increasing replacement cost.

thresholds.alert: Total employee cost exceeds $150,000. Review cost reduction opportunities.
Hidden loss drivers exceed 15% of total cost. Investigate productivity and turnover issues.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
